description_long: This factory building complex features a modern industrial design with multiple interconnected rectangular structures, each topped with large blue solar panels. The main building is flanked by a paved driveway and a separate structure that appears to be a covered loading or storage area, also equipped with solar panels. The exterior walls are a mix of light gray and pastel-colored panels, giving the building a contemporary appearance. Several large industrial windows are visible, providing ample natural light to the interior. Rooftop machinery, including HVAC units and vents, is present, indicating the building's functional, utilitarian purpose. The surrounding area is enclosed by a low retaining wall, and the overall layout suggests efficient access for vehicles and personnel.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with interconnected buildings, large blue solar panels, and visible rooftop machinery. The exterior features pastel panels, large industrial windows, and a separate covered loading area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main building with its rooftop solar panels and adjacent covered loading area, showing the paved driveway and retaining wall.
description_view_1: From this angle, the pastel-colored wall panels and the main entrance area are more visible, along with the side of the covered loading structure.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the large blue solar panels on both the main building and the loading area, as well as the building's overall footprint and driveway layout.
description_view_3: The rear of the complex is shown here, with rooftop machinery and vents clearly visible, and the loading area roof dominating the foreground.
